{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230149561AE40AA5C561F78D8463"}"},"total":165},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7403767608067867417","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的是番茄难得的经得起推敲的好书了，前后情节都有逻辑上的照应，从张志明急于追求晋升到后面异管局对圣教的应对，人物的逻辑和动机都很充分，除了这个之外作者对群像的写法把握的也很好，各个调查员的形象也不会过于单薄，希望后续作者可以继续写好这个风格，除了主角的主线也让我们看到各个人物精彩的故事，加油加油[送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723828350,"group_id":"7385559899821853758","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwY4/JDbVwwDHL94mAjyKG5Wt1YrAyfqiPXtlSLGT0H0","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788850&x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"2287419759275208","user_name":"黑夜有星星耶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2287419759275208","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7385559899821853758","book_info":{"abstract":"【群像】【网状叙事】【异能战斗】【末日】【类基金会】【类克苏鲁】
难以名状的异常层出不穷，人类失去了大部分土地，在高墙筑起的编号城市中苟延残喘，但高墙也会倒塌，英雄也会死亡，前方的路有许多条，没人知道哪一条是正确的。
科技与异能碰撞，机械与血肉争锋，真实与谎言交错，过去与未来重叠，一切都为了生存，一切都为了活着。
所有常识都被颠覆，所有认知都是虚妄，历史隐没于时间之中，生存埋藏在死亡之间，在残破的世界中，侥幸活下来的是幸运，还是厄运？
我究竟是什么？什么才算是人类？人类的未来究竟在何方？

-----分割线-----
无系统，无穿越，纯粹架空世界的本地故事。
群像叙事，没有绝对意义的主角，众多势力和角色，为了各自的理想努力，在绝境中拼搏出一条希望之路。
标题中的“我”并非指主角一人，而是这个世界中挣扎求生的每一个角色，故事中的每个角色都在为自己的理想而奋斗，即便这个理想不被另外一些人接受，即便这个理想几乎无法实现。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2of559af4a2e57a0e65343618c886fdc44~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"平不忧","author_id":"","book_id":"7385559899821853758","book_name":"我不是异常","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1160人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":705,"name":"克苏鲁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=705&name=克苏鲁&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7385560179732906558","read_count":"1160","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2187234"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.0","serial_count":"1037","tags":"科幻末世,末世,求生,无敌,末日求生,克苏鲁","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2of559af4a2e57a0e65343618c886fdc44~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779385796&x-signature=TjtYEAH6r8zN7W2OP4kQzVQMDT0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2400936187933789","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"149"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230149561AE40AA5C561F78D8463"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10
